## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes (ruff, mypy, pyright)
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or the public API changed
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (the library stays dependency-free)
- [ ] Commits are signed and follow Conventional Commits
